title: taraxacum breconense
intro: Taraxacum breconense, also known as Welsh dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to the UK. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum breconense include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum breconense can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
